item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Namun, pendapat Anda tentang risiko diskriminasi karena pembatasan kebebasan individu pun benar.

notes: Agent A starts by agreeing that social interests often take priority, then moves toward a balance/rights-caveat position after Agent B raises discrimination and individual-rights risks. Agent B remains consistently rights-first and ends by saying individual freedom is more important than the public interest. Both agents engage specific claims; no non-Latin script was observed.
